column1: # "Enthalpy of solution of carbohydrates using a modified DSC"
# NOT Thermochimica Acta 284:129 as cited in spec (citation error in spec)
#   Mannose: PARENT ONLY (no mannose deoxy series)
# VALUES BELOW: Placeholders awaiting paper table extraction.
# ΔΔH = ΔH_sol(parent) − ΔH_sol(deoxy) = hydration cost of removed OH
# Positive ΔΔH means that OH was favorably hydrated (costs energy to remove).
# SUPPLEMENTARY SOURCES NEEDED for mannose/galactose deoxy series:
#   - Jasra & Ahluwalia (1982) J. Solution Chem. 11:325 (sugars + polyols at 25/35°C)
#   - Galema et al. (1989) J. Phys. Chem. 93:7003 (heat capacity of sugar solutions)
#   - Banipal et al. (2010) J. Chem. Thermodyn. 42:696
#   - Franks et al. (1972) J. Solution Chem. 1:3 (referenced in Schwarz)
#   - Tait et al. (1972) J. Solution Chem. 1:131

column7: 4FGlu; F replaces OH (different physics than deoxy)
